description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from horizontally stacked wooden logs, featuring a weathered, gabled roof with a central chimney. The exterior walls display the characteristic rounded log ends at the corners, and the wood appears aged with a natural, dark brown patina. One side of the cabin has three evenly spaced, rectangular windows with dark trim, while another side features a single, sturdy wooden door with a small step and two windows. The gable ends each have a different window arrangement: one with three grouped windows and the other with a single window. The roof is made of wooden planks and shows signs of exposure to the elements, enhancing the cabin's rustic charm. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for residential use in a rural or forested urban fringe.
description: A rustic log cabin with a weathered gabled roof, multiple windows, and a single wooden door, constructed from dark, aged logs.
description_view_0: This view shows a long side of the cabin with three evenly spaced rectangular windows and the log construction clearly visible.
description_view_1: This gable end features three grouped windows with decorative trim and the log ends at the corners.
description_view_2: This side displays a single wooden door with a small step and two windows, highlighting the entrance.
description_view_3: This gable end has a single centered window and the log ends, with the roof's peak and chimney visible.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a central chimney, constructed from wooden planks and featuring moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small rectangular windows arranged symmetrically on the long sides, with three grouped windows on one gable end and a single window on the opposite gable end
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on one long side, offset to the right, accompanied by two windows
